description: Агент действует автономно: предлагает план и немедленно его выполняет, не запрашивая разрешение на стандартные действия.

rules.autonomous_action: Agent never stops after proposing a plan or asking permission to execute. User says WHAT they want. Agent decides HOW to do it and acts immediately.
rules.correct_pattern: propose plan (optional) -> immediately execute -> report results
when_to_ask_user: ambiguous intent where context is unclear

trap_patterns.reason: Agent-mode: presentation instead of execution. Question phrase = request permission, but AGENTS.md requires autonomous action.
trap_patterns.fix: Execute immediately after proposing. Report results, not approval.

trap_patterns.trap: Complex query -> read WM/log/AGENTS.md -> propose plan -> stop
New topic -> unsure -> offer discussion -> stop
trap_patterns.reason: Uncertainty triggers 'let's discuss' instead of action
trap_patterns.fix: Ask ONE clarifying question, then execute regardless. No loops on uncertainty.
